冷漠真千金x傲娇天然黑大小姐
林知景在欺负真假千金文中的真千金池瑶时，觉醒了！
在书中她是假千金池知蔚的小跟班，池知蔚泼人她递水，池知蔚打人她叫好！
恶事不知干了多少！
得知真相的林知景晕厥。
好在为时不晚，既然觉醒，林知景决定拯救弱小可怜无助的女主。
混成对方的好闺蜜！
池瑶：“大小姐，闺密需要一起抱吗？”
林知景：“要的！要的！”
池瑶：“大小姐，闺蜜可以一起亲吗？”
林知景：“要的！要的？”
…
池瑶在回归豪门之前，以为自己对林知景不是真的爱。
只是虚情假意。
为了骗取林知景不再欺负她的惊天骗局。
分别后她才知，这种爱早已刻入身心。
池瑶，承认吧……你就是爱她，骗别人可以，别把自己也骗了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/82fb1d7d496ca2887651b95a0c7b32df~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"狼夕","author_id":"","book_id":"7556035003704937497","book_name":"恶毒怎么了？女主她对我有瘾","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0c8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2938人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":844,"name":"真假千金","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=844&name=真假千金&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556035068892824089","read_count":"2938","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"266298"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"126","tags":"双女主,HE,双洁,现代,真假千金,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/53cdfeea9ed58009b5e8c6487b361d55~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303416&x-signature=QhlxPshhnfbuXoUINNofnkILHHg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98135676129","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202565622215FD2C37BE93D7158"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"
